message:
feat(fwc): add CapabilityTokenSource validation for live execution paths

Introduce CapabilityTokenSource enum (HostIssued, EnvironmentVariable,
CliFlag, TestGenerated, Placeholder) to distinguish real from synthetic
capability tokens. Add validate_capability_token_source() that rejects
test/placeholder tokens on live paths, SYNTHETIC_TOKEN_MARKERS for
content-based detection, contains_synthetic_token_marker() helper,
and classify_token_source() heuristic for raw token strings.

Key invariants enforced:
- No synthetic token validates for any token-requiring command
- All real token sources validate for all commands
- Test/placeholder tokens are explicitly identified and rejected
- Rejections include actionable remediation steps

Adds 24 new tests covering tag stability, serde round-trips, source
classification, validation logic, synthetic marker detection, and
cross-cutting no-synthetic-on-live invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
